description_long: An adult pedestrian is depicted standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally upward, creating a dramatic V-shape above the head. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, paired with closed-toe shoes. The figure has a slender build and a defined jawline, with medium-length hair styled to fall just past the shoulders. The facial features are neutral, and the posture is rigid, suggesting a static pose. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear practical for walking. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is casual and contemporary.
description: An adult pedestrian stands upright with arms raised in a V-shape, wearing a sleeveless top, straight pants, and closed-toe shoes. The figure has medium-length hair and a casual, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the person facing forward with both arms raised in a wide V-shape, revealing the sleeveless top and straight pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm extended upward, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the V-shaped arms, and the fit of the clothing from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile, the upward arm extension, and the straight alignment of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised in a V-shape
